conflict: Gloria defends the lie as survival strategy while Carina accuses Marisol of exploiting family pain for art and status.
consequence: Carina ejects Marisol from the apartment and cuts contact, formalizing the family rupture.
must_land_beats: Evidence is physically laid out on the table, preventing pure he-said-she-said evasions.
Gloria connects the myth to benefit eligibility and immigration fear.
Carina reveals she knew overdose details but not paternity risk.
Marisol leaves with one suitcase and no stable housing plan.
objective: Force Gloria and Carina into one room with the documentary evidence.
